title: Create: Power Grid - LEDs
description: An addon for Create: Power Grid that adds more energy efficient LED bulbs
body:
Create: Power Grid - LEDs is an addon for [Create: Power Grid](https://modrinth.com/mod/power-grid) that introduces more modern lighting technology to your electrical network.

Traditional light bulbs waste most of their energy as heat. In small systems, this is an inconvenience; in a large grid, it can become a serious issue. Overloaded circuits, overheating wires, and voltage drops can often be cause by something as simple as lighting.
